title: Zosterophyllanthos rhodoglossus
taxonomy: Zosterophyllanthos rhodoglossus is a plant species that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae. It is a part of the order Pinales and class Pinopsida. The family Podocarpaceae is a group of coniferous plants, and the order Pinales includes various coniferous species. The class Pinopsida is a sub-class of coniferous plants, which also includes the class Cycadopsida. Zosterophyllanthos rhodoglossus is a member of the kingdom Plantae, the most diverse group of organisms on Earth.
